import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  for t in tokens
    match string.parse_int(t)
    when Some(n)
      nums = list.push(nums, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  let total = list.sum(nums)
  let count = nums.len()
  let avg = total / count
  print("avg=#{avg}")
  Ok(())
end
